rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component type or implementation scopes while preserving AADL architecture.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes.
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>).
Use const, eq, and gua for declarations and equations.
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid using invalid AGREE scalar type names (use int, real, bool).
Avoid comparing Boolean data ranges or using 0/1 equality unless the port is an AGREE bool.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax notes (already known by the agent)
AADL scope notes (already known by the agent)
Integrated pattern chunks (not relevant to the current task)
